subtitles.original: clumsy trickでした！
subtitles.english: That was clumsy trick!

subtitles.original: どうだったかな？
subtitles.english: How did you like it?

subtitles.original: 最高だった！ / 最高です！
subtitles.english: It was awesome! / It was amazing!

subtitles.original: ラップくんとあんな風に一緒にパフォーマンスすることになるなんて
subtitles.english: To think I'd get to perform together with Lap-kun like that...

subtitles.original: 楽しかったな。
subtitles.english: It was so much fun.

subtitles.original: よかったら、こっちで一緒に話そうよ。
subtitles.english: If you'd like, why don't you come up and talk with me?

subtitles.original: えぇ！？ / へっ？
subtitles.english: What?! / Eh?

subtitles.original: 行って来いよ！
subtitles.english: Go on up!

subtitles.original: いやいやいや、あの、ここが、ここがやっぱり落ち着くんですけど...
subtitles.english: No, no, no. I mean, here... this is where I feel most comfortable...

subtitles.original: さっきは一緒にステージにいてくれたのに？
subtitles.english: But you were on stage with me just a moment ago.

subtitles.original: 確かに、確かに。
subtitles.english: That's true, that's true.

subtitles.original: 行って来いよ、望まれてるのかな？
subtitles.english: Go on up! You're being invited, aren't you?

subtitles.original: え、今行きます！待っててください！
subtitles.english: Oh, I'll be right there! Please wait for me!

subtitles.original: 来てくれた！
subtitles.english: She's coming!

subtitles.original: がんばれ。
subtitles.english: Do your best.

subtitles.original: 急に出てくるからびっくりしちゃったよ。
subtitles.english: I was surprised because you suddenly showed up.

subtitles.original: すみません、なんか、もう我慢できなくて...
subtitles.english: I'm sorry, I just couldn't contain myself any longer...

subtitles.original: そんな破天荒なところが、ラップくんの魅力だよね。
subtitles.english: That unpredictable side of you is what makes you so charming, Lap-kun.

subtitles.original: 私も見習いたいよ。
subtitles.english: I want to learn from you too.

subtitles.original: いや、もう、りなめお姉さんはもうこのままで素敵です！そのままいてください！
subtitles.english: No, Riname-oneesan is already wonderful just the way she is! Please stay as you are!

subtitles.original: ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Thank you.

subtitles.original: これからもお互い、アイドルとして頑張ろうね。
subtitles.english: Let's both keep doing our best as idols from now on.

subtitles.original: あ、もう、そ、恐縮です、ありがとうございます。頑張ります！
subtitles.english: Ah, that is... I'm so honored, thank you very much. I'll do my best!

subtitles.original: またこうやって一緒に共演できたら嬉しいな。
subtitles.english: I hope we can share the stage together again like this.

subtitles.original: あ、それももう、それも恐れ多すぎます。ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Ah, that as well... That's way too kind of you. Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 今日はありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for today!

subtitles.original: とっても素敵なミニライブでした！
subtitles.english: It was a truly wonderful mini-live!

subtitles.original: みんなも楽しんでくれたかな？
subtitles.english: I hope everyone had a great time too!

subtitles.original: それじゃあまたね！
subtitles.english: See you all again!

subtitles.original: ラップくんも！
subtitles.english: You too, Lap-kun!

subtitles.original: え、りなめお姉さん？
subtitles.english: Eh, Riname-oneesan...?

subtitles.original: お姉さん...
subtitles.english: Oneesan...
